## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the change (new behavior = new test that failed first)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under the next version
- [ ] User-facing docs/README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or store contents in code or fixtures
